title: Bitcoin Breaks $50K on Record ETF Inflows | Crypto Daily Briefing Jan 15 2025
description:
Bitcoin crossed the $50,000 mark today during Asian trading hours, fuelled by the largest single-day spot ETF inflow on record — over $500 million in one session. Ethereum ETFs also recorded their second-best inflow day since approval, signalling broad institutional demand across the crypto market.

In today's briefing:
- Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows hit all-time daily record above $500M
- Bitcoin briefly touches $50,000 — key psychological level tested
- Ethereum ETFs see second-best inflow day since launch
- On-chain data shows long-term holders accumulating
- Tomorrow's watchpoints: $50K close confirmation and FOMC calendar

Stay ahead of the market — subscribe for the daily crypto briefing and hit the bell so you never miss an update.
